errors.network: Network problem. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.validation: Please check the form and try again.
errors.forbidden: You do not have access to this.
errors.notFound: We could not find what you were looking for.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number.
errors.serverError: Server error. Our team has been notified.

home.heroSubtitle: Booking, matchmaking, rankings, tournaments. One quiet platform for every player and every club.
home.featureBookBody: See live availability across clubs in your city. Pay once, split with friends after.
home.featureFindBody: Match by level, location, and time. Glicko-2 keeps the ladder honest.
home.featurePlayBody: Club leagues, city opens, and federation events. One bracket, one ranking.
home.editionBody: A members tier for flagship clubs, annual invitationals, and the quieter rituals of the game.

auth.title: Sign in to Feera
auth.subtitle: Your court, your players, your matches. All in one place.
auth.otpSent: We sent a 6-digit code to your phone.
auth.magicLinkSent: Check your inbox. Tap the link to sign in.
auth.termsPrefix: By continuing you agree to our

onboarding.title: Welcome to Feera
onboarding.subtitle: A few quick details so we can match you to the right courts and players.
onboarding.genderNote: Used to suggest matches and respect club gender policies. You can change this later.
onboarding.privacyBody: Your phone, email, and exact location are never shown to other players. You choose what becomes visible on your profile.

me.title: My profile
me.subtitle: Update your details and control what other players see.
me.bioPlaceholder: Right-handed, evening player, prefers Bandeja over Vibora.
me.exportDescription: Download a JSON copy of everything we store about you.
me.deleteDescription: Permanently remove your profile, bookings, and match history. This cannot be undone.
me.deleteConfirmBody: Type DELETE below to confirm. Your data is removed within 30 days.

privacyControls.title: Privacy controls
privacyControls.subtitle: Choose who sees what on your profile. Your safety, your call.
privacyControls.showFullName: Show my full name on my profile
privacyControls.showFullNameHelp: When off, other players see only your first name.
privacyControls.showRatingHelp: Visible on your profile and on open match listings.
privacyControls.showInOpenMatches: Show me in the open matches feed
privacyControls.showInOpenMatchesHelp: Turn off if you only want to play with friends.
privacyControls.womenOnlyHelp: Only show me in matches at clubs and times that are women only.
privacyControls.calendarHelp: Used for displaying dates across the app.

play.heroTitle: Find a court. Book a slot. Play with anyone.
play.heroSubtitle: Live availability across clubs in your city. Solo or with three friends. Open the seat to strangers and we will match you on level.
play.noClubs: No clubs yet in this city. Be the first to list one.
play.openMatchesSubtitle: Slots looking for one more player. Join in two taps.
play.openMatchesEmpty: No open matches near you right now. Check back soon or open your own.
play.myBookingsEmpty: You have no bookings yet. Find a court to get started.
play.noSlots: No slots available for this date.
play.coachesSubtitle: Book a lesson with verified coaches in your city.
play.tournamentsSubtitle: Club leagues, city opens, federation events.
play.disputeTitle: Report a problem with this match
play.disputeReasonPlaceholder: Describe the issue. Our team will review within 48 hours.
play.disputeSubmitted: Report received. We will be in touch.

bookings.openSeatsHelp: Leave seats open for the matchmaker to fill.
bookings.notesPlaceholder: Mixed doubles, social pace, English or Urdu welcome.
bookings.bookingConfirmedBody: Receipt and court details are on the way to your inbox.
bookings.cancelBody: Free cancellation up to 12 hours before. After that, your share is non-refundable.
bookings.joinRequestsEmpty: No one has asked to join yet.

payments.title: Pay
payments.paymentFailed: Payment failed. Please try a different method.
payments.refundRequested: Refund requested. It usually settles within 5 working days.
payments.secureNote: Payments are encrypted and processed by our regional partners.

clubs.directorySubtitle: Verified venues in your city. Live availability, transparent pricing.
clubs.noResults: No clubs match your filters. Try widening the search.
clubs.onboardSubtitle: Reach players, fill courts, run leagues. Free to get started.
clubs.onboardingPending: We will verify your club within 2 working days.

coaches.directorySubtitle: Federation-licensed coaches near you. Real reviews, transparent rates.
coaches.reviewPlaceholder: How was the session? Be specific and respectful.
coaches.onboardSubtitle: Get bookings, manage your schedule, build your reputation.

edition.title: Feera Edition.
edition.subtitle: A quieter membership for the players, clubs, and rituals that define the modern game.
edition.pillar1Body: Curated venues with permanent court holds, member rates, and host privileges.
edition.pillar2Body: Annual draws across Lahore, Lisbon, and the Gulf. Closed fields, classical formats.
edition.pillar3Body: Long-form essays, photography, and federation-level reporting. Quarterly.
edition.applySubtitle: Tell us about your game, your club, and the players who introduced you.
edition.applySent: Application received. We respond personally within ten working days.
